gear_items.title: Soft-sided personal item (compressible)
gear_items.why_it_works: Compresses into sizers and avoids the “boxy hardshell” pre-tag bias on full flights.

gear_items.title: Under-seat backpack (structured but flexible)
gear_items.why_it_works: Carries like a backpack but still has “give” at the sizer edges.

gear_items.title: Foldable duffel (weight-split backup)
gear_items.why_it_works: Lets you split a heavy bag into two at the kiosk to avoid overweight fees.
